description: DS3231 Real-Time Clock with Temperature — Standard Test Vectors for Renode I2C Emulation

0x00.name: time_regs
0x00.description: Time registers (7 bytes): sec=0x30(30s), min=0x15(15m), hr=0x10(10h), day=0x04(Wed), date=0x17(17), month=0x04(Apr), year=0x25(2025). BCD format.

0x11.name: temperature
0x11.description: Temperature register (2 bytes): MSB=0x19 (25 C), LSB=0x40 (0.25 C fraction). Total = 25.25 C = 25250 mC.

steps.description: Call ds3231_read_temp(&temp_mc) or ds3231_read_time(&time). Reads from register 0x11 (temp) or 0x00 (time). Expect return 0.

default.raw_value_description: Temperature in millidegrees C. 0x19,0x40 → 25.25 C → 25250 mC. Or time fields in BCD.

required_writes.description: Register pointer write before repeated-start read: 0x11 for ds3231_read_temperature, 0x00 for ds3231_read_time. ds3231_init itself issues no I2C traffic.

runtime_tests.name: time_2025_04_17_10_15_30_temp_25_25c
runtime_tests.note: Time (BCD): 10:15:30 Wed 2025-04-17. Temp 0x1940 = 25.25°C = 25250 mC. raw_alt covers drivers that return °C (25), raw register 0x1940=6464, or shifted-right forms.

runtime_tests.name: midnight_newyear_2000_temp_0c
runtime_tests.note: 00:00:00 Sat 2000-01-01. Temp 0x00,0x00 = 0 C = 0 mC. Zero-point edge case for both time and temp.

runtime_tests.name: leap_year_feb29_temp_25c
runtime_tests.note: 23:59:59 Thu 2024-02-29 (leap year). Temp 0x19,0x00 = 25.0 C. Exercises month-rollover logic and leap-day.

runtime_tests.name: winter_neg10c_fractional
runtime_tests.note: 08:30:15 Mon 2025-12-15. Temp MSB=0xF6 (-10), LSB[7:6]=01 (+0.25) -> -9.75 C = -9750 mC. raw_alt covers: integer C drivers (-9 or -10), unsigned 16-bit 0xF640=63040, signed 16-bit (int16_t)0xF640=-2496. Negative + fractional edge case.

runtime_tests.name: datasheet_temp_max_85c
runtime_tests.note: Temp 0x55,0x00 = 85.0 C = 85000 mC. DS3231 datasheet operating maximum.

runtime_tests.name: datasheet_temp_min_neg40c
runtime_tests.note: Temp MSB=0xD8 (two's complement -40). DS3231 datasheet operating minimum.
